title: franseria sanctae-gertrudis
intro: Franseria sanctae-gertrudis, also known as Geranium, is a perennial plant in the family Asteraceae, native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Franseria sanctae-gertrudis include alleviating menstrual cramps, reducing anxiety, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Franseria sanctae-gertrudis can be found in teas, tinctures, and ointments, and it is often used in herbal medicine to support women's health and well-being.
